Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - AGNES van Gelre, daughter of HENDRIK Graaf van Gelre & his wife Agnes von Arnstein (-24 Jan ----, bur Echternach).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes von Geldern於1155年出生在蓋爾德時，她的父親Heinrich I. von Geldern38歲，母親Agnes von Arnstein36歲。她於1168年與Henri IV de Luxembourg de Namur結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1196年在她的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在盧森堡艾傑特爾納賀。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes von Geldern于1155年出生在蓋爾德时，她的父亲Heinrich I. von Geldern38岁，母亲Agnes von Arnstein36岁。她于1168年与Henri IV de Luxembourg de Namur结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1196年在她的家乡享年41岁，埋葬在卢森堡艾傑特爾納賀。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Geldern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northern England usually a variant of Geldard, an occupational name from Middle English gelde ‘sterile, barren’, used as a noun to denote ‘gelded cattle’, + Old English hierde, hence ‘herdman who tends the gelded cattle’.
English: alternatively, perhaps an occupational name from Middle English gelder(e) ‘gelder, castrator (of livestock)’.

variants.name: Gilder
meanings: English (Essex and Middlesex): occupational name for a goldsmith or gilder, from Middle English gilder, gelder, guldar, a derivative of Old English gyldan ‘to gild’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes von Geldern was born in 1155, in Guelders, her father, Heinrich I. von Geldern, was 38 and her mother, Agnes von Arnstein, was 36. She married Henri IV de Luxembourg de Namur in 1168. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1196, in her hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Echternach, Luxembourg.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes von Geldern est née en 1155, à Geldern, son père, Heinrich I. von Geldern, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Arnstein, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Henri IV de Luxembourg de Namur en 1168. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1196, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Echternach, Luxembourg.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes von Geldern 1155 in Geldern geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich I. von Geldern 38 und ihre Mutter Agnes von Arnstein 36. Sie hat 1168 Henri IV de Luxembourg de Namur geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1196 im Alter von 41 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Echternach, Luxemburg begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Geldern è nata il nel 1155 nel Geldern, sua padre, Heinrich I. von Geldern, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Agnes von Arnstein, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Henri IV de Luxembourg de Namur nel 1168. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1196, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Echternach, Lussemburgo.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes von Geldernが1155年にジェルデルンで生まれた時，父Heinrich I. von Geldernは38歳，母Agnes von Arnsteinは36歳であった。1168年にHenri IV de Luxembourg de Namurと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1196年に故郷で41歳で死去し，ルクセンブルクエチテルナチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes von Geldern(이)가 1155년 글더에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich I. von Geldern(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes von Arnstein(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1168년 Henri IV de Luxembourg de Namur(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1196년 그녀의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 룩셈부르크 트른악h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Geldern nasceu em 1155, em Geldern, seu pai, Heinrich I. von Geldern, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Arnstein, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Henri IV de Luxembourg de Namur em 1168. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1196, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Echternach, Luxemburgo.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes von Geldern родилась в 1155 г. в местности джелдирн, её отцу по имени Heinrich I. von Geldern было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Arnstein, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henri IV de Luxembourg de Namur в 1168 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1196 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности эчтирнач, Люксембург.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes von Geldern nació en 1155, en Geldern, su papá, Heinrich I. von Geldern, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Agnes von Arnstein, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Henri IV de Luxembourg de Namur en 1168. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1196, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Echternach, Luxemburgo.
